title: Merge Machine
narrative: No swapping at all! Instead, merge two sorted groups by always clicking the smaller front crate. Split the problem, sort the pieces, merge them back. It's fast!

levels.name: Merge Two
levels.hint: Two sorted groups. Click whichever front crate is smaller to add it to the output. Easy!

levels.name: Four Groups
levels.hint: Four small sorted groups. Merge the first two, then the next two, then merge the results!

levels.name: Split and Merge
levels.hint: 8 crates start as pairs. Merge pairs into groups of 4, then merge those into the final 8.

levels.name: Why Sort?
levels.hint: Sort 16 crates by merging... then see how fast you can FIND a number in the sorted result!
